en: 1. Try a video diary. Record yourself speaking, like I'm doing now. It will help you get used to speaking.
ko: 1. 영상 일기를 해봐 음성 메시지로 말하기를 연습해. 계획하고

en: 2. Practice speaking via voice message. You can plan, practice, record again.
ko: 2. 음성 메시지를 통해 말하기 연습해. 계획하고, 연습하고, 다시 녹음할 수 있어.

en: Much less pressure than a face-to-face conversation. 3. Do a hobby in English. If you like reading, join a book club.
ko: 연습하고 다시 녹음할 수 있어. 대면 대화보다 훨씬 부담이 적지. 3. 영어로 취미를 해 영어로. 독서를 좋아하면 북클럽에 들어가. 운동을 좋아하면 주 언어가

en: If you like sports, join a team where the main language is English. You will learn so much without even noticing.
ko: 이 새 팟캐스트와 영상 시리즈에서 들어봐

en: Hear from experts and get practical tips in this new podcast and video series. Find Beating Speaking Anxiety at bbclearningenglish.com.

en: Are you worried people will judge you for your mistakes? Do you feel stressed when you can't understand the other person? Don't worry, let me help.
